tokens.title: Personal access tokens
tokens.description: Create, review, and manage API tokens for scripts, integrations, and CLI use.
tokens.createDescription: Choose a memorable name and expiration. The token value is shown only once.
tokens.tokenValueWarning: This token will not be shown again. Copy it somewhere secure now.
tokens.tableDescription: Active tokens stay visible by default. Older revoked or expired tokens can be revealed when needed.
tokens.renewConfirm: Renew this token? The previous value will stop working immediately.

adminTokens.title: Admin tokens
adminTokens.tableDescription: Review and manage tokens issued across the workspace.
